headline: KeyBanc Raises its Price Target on Microchip Technology (MCHP) to $135
summary: Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) is one of the 9 Best American Semiconductor Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On May 8, 2026, KeyBanc raised the firm’s price target on Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) to $135 from $85 while maintaining an Overweight rating. The firm said the company delivered strong fiscal Q4 results and provided Q1 […]

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Microchip Technology, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: Barclays  analyst Tom O'Malley   maintains Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $80 to $105.

headline: 5 Stock Picks Last Week From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: The US stock market closed higher on Friday, with the Nasdaq Composite gaining over 400 points. Wall Street analysts make daily stock picks, but not all are accurate. Benzinga's Analyst Ratings API provides high-quality ratings and can be used as a trading indicator to beat the market. Top picks from the most accurate analysts include CDW, Allegro MicroSystems, and Microchip Technology.

headline: A Look At Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation After Strong Earnings Beat And Upbeat Guidance
summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) is back in focus after reporting fourth quarter and full year results that beat expectations, issuing upbeat guidance, and combining this with product launches, expansion projects, and a fresh quarterly dividend. See our latest analysis for Microchip Technology. The latest earnings beat and guidance appear to have reset expectations, with a 30 day share price return of 50.47% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 112.90% suggesting strong momentum after a weaker...
